name: team-skills
description: LGWF Codex skills for workflow routing, monitoring, and improvement.

interface.shortDescription: LGWF workflow facade and support skills.
interface.longDescription: Team Skills packages LGWF-related Codex skills for routing user requests to workflows, monitoring workflow execution, and improving workflow behavior from run evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use /lgwf-wf-tools to route this request to a suitable workflow.
